26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @slimvictor made this dog on the beach!
27 Man Tax: David Strathairn
“Every individual has a place to fill in the world, and is important, in some respect, whether he chooses to be so or not.” - Nathaniel Hawthorne So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: "WAT, CHA"
item.description: The 60-30-10 rule is a timeless, simple design formula used to create balanced, harmonious color schemes in interior design, fashion, and UI design. It dictates that 60% of a space/design is a dominant primary color, 30% is a secondary color, and 10% is an accent color, ensuring visual interest without chaos.
item.dc:creator: 77thtimesthecharm

item.title: Saturday Chaotic MEME Dump (Of Memes) #584
item.description:
1. She was checking if hi is clean shaven surely? Right? RIGHT>?!
2. FABULOUS (Sound: ON)
3
4. Harsh language was used
5. Wait, is the house supposed to stay over the water? (SOUP)
6
7. Very Innovative
8
9. Me after posting my dump on IMGUR:
10. Why is this so accurate? OMG!
11
12. Imagine having to start every morning doing this
13. Unexpected
14. This house is haunted for sure
15. Quick question: My brother thinks it's dumb to have this text in our game. Should we remove it? Context: we're a two brother team from Eastern Europe and we're making a game based on The Milgram Experiment. As dev and as a player I really dislike AI, the impact it has on our society and the people behind it (freaking soulless lizards). I also am not to happy when I see other devs use it for their games. In our project I use no AI art, no AI writing, no AI music. And yet on several occasions someone from a streamer's chat playing our demo would ask if the voice acting is AI or if a video I used in the game is AI. So I decided to put this message at the start of the game to make that clear. My brother saw that and said he never saw that in any other game and we should remove it because "it's dumb". Should we remove it? Is there a chance it will piss the AI bros. Steam page for the game: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1634 (mongol cyberpunk)
item.description:
Let's get this bread
Have had a low grade toothache the last three days now, but this morning it's at it's lowest ebb.... for now.
ASSUMING DIRECT CONTROL
That's just most of the world thanks to something my shithole country is doing to someone else at this point
Mongol Cyberpunk
Yeah it's like that now.
The vessel was found to be a fake, sadly
The ones in western Europe are known for having prominent eyebrow markings.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "How are you? Pippin!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Speaking on behalf of people who speak multiple languages, we’re ok with this
item.description: https://bsky.app/profile/atrupar.com/post/3mgi3w6i7ud2c You barely speak English, learning another language is way beyond your cognitive abilities. It’s bad enough we have to listen to your barely passable English, don’t add to the torture. “I love the poorly educated”, he said, without a hint of irony.

item.title: Dragonfly eating yellow jacket
item.description: Dragonflies are among the most successful predators on Earth, boasting an incredible hunting success rate of 90% to 97%. This efficiency far surpasses other top predators, such as sharks or lions. Their success is driven by 360-degree vision, independent wing control, and the ability to calculate prey trajectory.
item.dc:creator: wolfwinter

item.title: It’s always been profit of the people
item.description: Remember if you have ever been a “red hat” this is what you voted for. Whatever comes to pass will be squarely on your shoulders. You all elected a kid fucker, who in turn has used the shield of president to murder, genocide, insurrect, lie, cheat, and steal. Congress decision making has been destroyed, the supreme court authority has been quashed and we sit squarely on the precipice of our own dictatorship. We are showing our belly to the world. Enough money is being spent in a week to fix all of the USA’s homelessness, hunger, and lack of medical care problems but our priorities are based on the whim of a despot.
item.dc:creator: flexsidepick

item.title: GovBrief Today #400
item.description: We bombed a school full of girls and the Pentagon's takeaway is that they need better technology. 150 people were killed when the Shajareh Tayyebeh school in Minab, Iran was destroyed on day one of the war. It took only eight days for Pentagon investigators to conclude that we probably did it. On the same day, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told 60 Minutes that killing is "our job" and that "the only ones that need to be worried right now are Iranians that think they're gonna live." Also today, the Pentagon's chief technology officer said Anthropic was blacklisted after refusing to build autonomous weapons and mass surveillance for the military. The Pentagon needed partners it could rely on, he said. Google, ChatGPT, and Elon Musk agreed to remove their limits. They apparently agree that the killing can be more clinical and precise, like a video game. The email version of GovBrief launched one year ago tonight to five people. Tonight nearly 6,000 of you will read this. No newscast lets you scan this many stories and drill into the ones you care most about. Subscribe now at govbrief.today. Get one more person reading. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/fiu-racist-chat [2] https://go.govbrief.today/venezuela-gold [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-ground-spec [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar6 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/russia-iran-intel [6] https://go.govbrief.today/girls-school-bombing [7] https://go.govbrief.today/prasad-leaves-again [8] https://go.govbrief.today/legionella-baltimore [9] https://go.govbrief.today/clark-resigns [10] https://go.govbrief.today/tn-west-bank [11] https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-tariff-refunds [12] https://go.govbrief.today/92k-job-loss [13] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-auto [14] https://go.govbrief.today/military-ecuador-action [15] https://go.govbrief.today/halligan-reversal [16] https://go.govbrief.today/martinez-video [17] https://go.govbrief.today/issa-retires [18] https://go.govbrief.today/nso-director [19] https://go.govbrief.today/portland-gas-order Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: One of my favourite videos lately, it's got it all... drive by hisses, interesting architecture, happy people, a happy Sigrid meow and a very rare and beautiful black swan! This was our final ride in Milton Keynes before heading home.
item.dc:creator: sigirides
